creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #3)
Hi Robert,

Thank you so much for getting to so many of my contributions in the last two weeks.  You and a few other committers have been enormously helpful.

I have a ton of new ports under development on my github and not yet online, but I don't want to overwhelm committers with too many submissions, and want to make them more compliant with the current poudriere best practices.


There are a few, like for lang/twelf, that I had to patch to work on 13.2 recently, but those aren't online yet, and I'll update the PRs for those soon to get them back in shape.

Regards,
Tim
